name: sam-gov-mcp
description: MCP server for SAM.gov entity registration, exclusions, opportunities, contract awards (FPDS replacement), federal hierarchy, and FFATA subaward reporting
long_description:
Queries SAM.gov REST APIs for federal entity and contract data, including:

- **Entity Management v3** (UEI/CAGE lookups, registration status, business types, NAICS/PSC, reps and certs)
- **Exclusions v4** (debarment, suspension, responsibility determinations)
- **Opportunities v2** (solicitations, sources sought, award notices)
- **Contract Awards v1** (FPDS replacement; PIID lookups, mod histories, vendor award searches)
- **Federal Hierarchy v1** (agency/sub-agency/office normalization, FH org IDs, CGAC, hierarchy walking)
- **Acquisition Subaward Reporting v1** (FFATA subcontracts; prime/sub relationships, deleted records)
- **Assistance Subaward Reporting v1** (FFATA grant subawards)
- **PSC code lookups**

19 read-only tools. Built for GS-1102 contracting officers, contract specialists, and anyone performing pre-award or responsibility determinations.

Independently hardened across 8 audit rounds with 1,094 regression tests. v0.4 added 278 tests for the new endpoints (123 live, 155 offline including Hypothesis property tests). Live audit caught and fixed 3 silently-ignored Subaward API parameters where SAM.gov's documented uppercase casings (PIID, referencedIdvPIID, referencedIDVAgencyID) actually return unfiltered results; the working casings (piid, referencedIDVPIID, referencedIDVAgencyId) are now used. Origin repo for the `extra='forbid'` pydantic pattern that protects every 1102tools MCP from typo'd parameter name silent-wrong-data bugs.

Full testing record in the source repository.

sam_api_key.title: SAM.gov API Key
sam_api_key.description: Free API key from https://sam.gov (sign in, go to Account Details, request a key). Rotates every 90 days; regenerate at sam.gov and update here when it expires.
